description: Remove chat feature module and related code
steps: Remove ChatView import and usage from App.tsx
Update App.tsx to prepare for workspace layout
Verify no remaining references to chat types or data

description: Create workspace domain types and models
steps: Create src/features/workspace/types/index.ts with Project, Session, SessionStatus types
Define AgentActivity types (file changes, tool calls, test results)
Export all types from workspace feature module

description: Create mock data for workspace layout
steps: Create src/features/workspace/data/mockActivity.ts with sample file changes, tool calls, tests
Ensure mock data matches design spec format

description: Build new Icon Rail component for project navigation
steps: Implement project avatar display (2-letter abbreviations, 32x32 rounded)
Add active project highlight with purple pill backlight
Add + new project and ⚙ settings buttons at bottom

description: Build Sidebar with session list
steps: Implement session list section with mock data
Add session item cards with name, status badge, timestamp
Add active session highlight (left purple border, lighter background)

description: Build Context Switcher tabs for sidebar
steps: Implement tab row (📁 Files | 📝 Editor | ± Diff)
Add active tab styling (purple text and bottom border)

description: Build Terminal Zone placeholder with tab bar
steps: Implement tab bar at top (🤖 agent tabs, 🐚 shell tabs)
Add active tab highlighting (purple bottom border)
Create placeholder terminal content area (dark background, prompt text)

description: Build Agent Activity status card section
steps: Display agent name (Claude Code) and status badge

description: Build Agent Activity pinned metrics section
steps: Add 5-hour usage bar (142/200 messages, purple gradient progress)
Style with proper spacing and colors

description: Build Agent Activity collapsible sections
Build Files Changed section component
steps: Display file list with change type badges (new/modified/deleted)

description: Build Tool Calls and Tests sections
steps: Show placeholder content with count badges

description: Build Agent Activity footer
steps: Display session duration, turn count, lines added/removed

description: Assemble complete Agent Activity panel
steps: Compose StatusCard, PinnedMetrics, all sections, and footer

description: Wire context panels to sidebar context switcher
steps: Update Sidebar to show Files/Editor/Diff based on active tab
Ensure existing FilesView, EditorView, DiffView adapt to 260px width
Test panel switching with mock data
Verify all context panels render correctly in sidebar

description: Create WorkspaceView page component
Refactor App.tsx to use WorkspaceView
steps: Replace with WorkspaceView as primary component

description: Update Tailwind config with new semantic tokens
steps: Add primary-dim variants (#cba6f7 at various opacities)
Verify all new tokens match Obsidian Lens spec

description: Apply design tokens to all new components
steps: Audit all workspace components for hardcoded colors
Replace with semantic tokens from tailwind.config.js
Match Stitch mockup colors exactly (reference code.html)

description: Visual verification against Stitch mockup
steps: Check all color tokens match Catppuccin Mocha palette
Verify typography (Manrope headlines, Inter body, JetBrains Mono code)

description: Integration tests for workspace layout
steps: Write integration test: project switching updates sidebar
Write integration test: session switching updates terminal and activity
Write integration test: context panel switching in sidebar
Write integration test: collapsible sections expand/collapse

description: Run all quality checks and fix issues
steps: Run npm run lint and fix all issues
Run npm run type-check and fix type errors
Run npm run format and ensure consistent formatting
Run npm test and achieve 80%+ coverage
Verify all git hooks pass (pre-commit, commit-msg)

description: Final Phase 2 verification checklist
steps: Verify: 4-zone layout renders (icon rail, sidebar, terminal, activity)
Verify: Icon rail shows project avatars with active highlight
Verify: Sidebar shows mock session list with status badges
Verify: Agent Activity panel shows all sections with mock data
Verify: Chat view and all chat code removed
Verify: All tests pass, ESLint and Prettier clean
